CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing To Approve The Petition Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Continued To Dec-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Off Calendar

Hearing To Approve The Petition Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Lawrence Bragman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Corrine Rice, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Peter Patrakis, who was also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlment Amount - $100,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $23,388.79.
Medical Expenses - $6,445.04.
Costs - $8,065.25.

A net balance of $62,100.97 shall be designated as follows: $2,100.97 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of Marin, located at 4460 Redwood Highway, San Rafael, CA 94903. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor the age of 18 years. The remaining $60,000.00 shall be invested directly in a single premium deferred annuity, which provides for payment as follows: 1) age 21 - $41,000.00; age 25 - $56,175.00; 3) Total $97,175.00.------, San Francisco, CA.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
